items.explanation: defines and applies video filters to segments of the video.
items.name: The Video Filter Editor

items.explanation: shows the start, finish and length of the video segment to which the filter will be applied.
items.name: The Range Label

items.explanation: lists the filters you have applied to the video.
items.name: The Table View

items.explanation: adds a new filter to the list.
items.name: The Add Button

items.explanation: shows the effect of the applied filter on the first, middle, and last video frames.
items.name: The Preview Frame View

items.explanation: shows the first, middle, and last video frames to which the filter will be applied.
items.name: The Original Frame View

items.explanation: selects the time range in the video to which the selected filter will be applied.
items.name: The Range Slider

items.explanation: adjusts the color temperature of the applied filter.
items.name: The Color Temperature Slider

items.explanation: adjusts the tint of the applied filter.
items.name: The Color Tint Slider

items.explanation: adjusts the gamma (mid-tone lift) of the applied filter.
items.name: The Gamma Slider

items.explanation: adjusts the highlight protection of the applied filter.
items.name: The Highlight Protection Slider

items.explanation: adjusts the shadow lift of the applied filter.
items.name: The Shadow Lift Slider

items.explanation: opens a window that plays a preview of the applied filter.
items.name: The Preview button

items.explanation: discards the changes you made and quits the Video Filter Editor.
items.name: The Cancel button

items.explanation: saves any changes you made and quits the Video Filter Editor.
items.name: The Apply/Update button
